texto: I had a theory; I’m not sure if it was my own but it worked for me. Public spaces, such as streets and subway stations, became inhabitable as I assigned them some value and imprinted an experience on them. If I recited a snatch of Paterson every time I walked along a certain avenue, eventually that avenue would sound like William Carlos Williams. The entrance to the subway at 116th Street was Emily Dickinson’s:Presentiment is that long shadow on the lawnIndicative that suns go down;The notice to the startled grassThat darkness is about to pass.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Valeria Luiselli: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I had a theory; I’m not sure if it was my own but it worked for me. Public spaces, such as street…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que desenvolvimento-pessoal, city, poetry-quotes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: I had a theory; I’m not sure if it was my own but it worked for me. Public spaces, such as streets and subway stations, became inhabitable as I assigned them some value and imprinted an experience on them. If I recited a snatch of Paterson every time I walked along a certain avenue, eventually that avenue would sound like William Carlos Williams. The entrance to the subway at 116th Street was Emily Dickinson’s:Presentiment is that long shadow on the lawnIndicative that suns go down;The notice to the startled grassThat darkness is about to pass.

texto: He fell into a solemn silence, which he only eventually broke to say, “I think I’ve become a terrible person. In fact, I’ve become a reptile. Do you know that reptiles are stupid because almost their entire brain capacity is used to feel fear?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Valeria Luiselli que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “He fell into a solemn silence, which he only eventually broke to say, “I think I’ve become a terr…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fear, reptiles, com foco em reflexao-noturna e dia-chuvoso.
